name: Function inlining
promptTemplate: Given the following {{language}} program, identify a function other than the main function and optimize it out via function inlining. If no applicable function exists, return the original program unchanged.
cAdapter: Inline a non-main C function into its call sites when doing so can reduce the program.
rustAdapter: Inline a non-main Rust function into simple call sites when ownership and syntax can remain valid.
jsAdapter: Inline a JavaScript function into simple call sites when scope and runtime behavior required by the oracle can remain valid.
safetyPredicate: Accept only candidates that are smaller by the token counter and pass the interestingness oracle.

name: Loop unrolling
promptTemplate: Given the following {{language}} program, identify a loop structure and optimize it out via loop unrolling or direct simplification. If no applicable loop exists, return the original program unchanged.
cAdapter: Replace a simple C loop with fewer direct statements when the oracle behavior is preserved.
rustAdapter: Replace a simple Rust loop with fewer direct statements or a simpler expression when valid.
jsAdapter: Replace a simple JavaScript loop with fewer direct statements when valid.
safetyPredicate: Accept only candidates that are smaller by the token counter and pass the interestingness oracle.

name: Data type elimination
promptTemplate: Given the following {{language}} program, identify a redundant programmer-defined data type and substitute every instance with its underlying type. If no redundant data type exists, return the original program unchanged.
cAdapter: Remove redundant typedef-like C declarations by replacing uses with the underlying type.
rustAdapter: Remove redundant Rust aliases or wrapper types only when syntax and oracle behavior remain valid.
jsAdapter: Remove redundant JavaScript type-like scaffolding such as unused constructor/wrapper declarations when valid.
safetyPredicate: Accept only candidates that are smaller by the token counter and pass the interestingness oracle.

name: Data type simplification
promptTemplate: Given the following {{language}} program, identify a complex data type and simplify or decompose it into smaller primary values. If no safe simplification exists, return the original program unchanged.
cAdapter: Simplify structs, arrays, pointers, or other complex C data when a smaller valid representation exists.
rustAdapter: Simplify structs, tuples, references, or containers when ownership and syntax remain valid.
jsAdapter: Simplify arrays, objects, or wrapper values when the oracle behavior remains valid.
safetyPredicate: Accept only candidates that are smaller by the token counter and pass the interestingness oracle.

name: Variable elimination
promptTemplate: Given the following {{language}} program, identify an intermediate or unused variable and optimize it out via constant propagation, copy propagation, or deletion. If no applicable variable exists, return the original program unchanged.
cAdapter: Remove or propagate unused/intermediate C variables, globals, locals, or parameters.
rustAdapter: Remove or propagate unused/intermediate Rust bindings while preserving valid ownership and syntax.
jsAdapter: Remove or propagate unused/intermediate JavaScript variables, bindings, or parameters.
safetyPredicate: Accept only candidates that are smaller by the token counter and pass the interestingness oracle.
